seoTitle: Fisherman Bay vs Five Miles — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Fisherman Bay and Five Miles. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Fisherman Bay vs Five Miles: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Fisherman Bay and Five Miles.
heading: Fisherman Bay vs Five Miles — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Fisherman Bay, South Australia and Five Miles, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Fisherman Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Five Miles (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Fisherman Bay or Five Miles safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Fisherman Bay has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Five Miles scores 43/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Fisherman Bay scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Five Miles scores 34/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Fisherman Bay or Five Miles?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Fisherman Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.68% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
